faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Hewlett typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Hewlett, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Hewlett homeowners most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wood structures, especially in older homes. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment method.
